General.Name: Beijing Enterprises Environment Group Ltd
General.Description: Beijing Enterprises Environment Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the solid waste treatment business in Mainland China. The company operates solid waste treatment projects, including household waste incineration power generation projects, and hazardous and medical waste treatment projects. It also sells electricity and steam generated from waste incineration. The company was formerly known as Beijing Development (Hong Kong) Limited and changed its name to Beijing Enterprises Environment Group Limited in July 2016. Beijing Enterprises Environment Group Limited was incorporated in 1963 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Central Plaza, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
